data.name: Gachi-Haru/ガチムチでドスケベな家庭教師のお兄さんと過ごす春
data.detailed_description:
大綱

「我找到新的夢想了。」

季節流轉，時序來到了櫻花綻放的時節。

響涼太找到了新的夢想，再次挑戰大學入學考試。
而給予他支持的，正是他的家教老師兼男友――劍崎敦。

順利考上大學的涼太，在春假時由敦帶他參觀校園。
此時，涼太巧遇了高中時期的摯友――虎丸庵。
兩人聊起在棒球社的過往等懷舊話題，相談甚歡，再次恢復了交流。

但是！庵竟然是個會拿涼太當「配菜」瘋狂打手槍的大色胚！
而且，在涼太不知情之處，敦和庵的大肌肌肉棒對決也隨之爆發！？

這個春天，究竟會變得如何呢！？

看點

Wasp所繪製的充滿魅力的角色！

由實力派繪師――Wasp擔任本作的角色設計及原畫！
比『Gachi-Natsu』更加升級的肌肉和色氣描寫！敬請享受涼太、敦以及新角色庵的色色場景。

完全沒有麻煩的系統！

大量的選項，各個結局迥然不同？特殊的通關條件？完全沒有這些要素！
本遊戲為「輕鬆享受色色情節和故事！」作為主打概念的單線式視覺小說。

激鬥！大肌肌肉棒對決！

本作中，敦VS庵的男子漢對決「超級硬梆梆大色胚大肌肌肉棒對決」即將爆發！
激烈的肉棒對決逐漸升溫，最後竟然發展成3P！？請放心，這並非會破壞涼太和敦感情的NTR發展，而是愉快又色色的3P！

data.short_description: 「──所以啊。我為了不讓他聽見，輕聲說了再見。」 再次挑戰大學入學考試的主角，遇見了過去的初戀對象。 再加上大肌肌帥哥家教哥哥，一場春天的超色愛情故事即將拉開序幕！
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 日文*, 韓文, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Gachi-Haru
data.detailed_description:
Introduction

"I've found a new dream."

The seasons passed, and the time for cherry blossoms was drawing near.

Having found a new dream, Ryota Hibiki is retrying the university entrance exams.

Supporting him is his tutor and boyfriend, Atsushi Kenzaki.

After successfully passing his exams, Ryota is given a tour of the university by Atsushi during spring break.

It is then that Ryota has a chance reunion with his high school best friend, Iori Toramaru.

The two reconnect, getting excited over nostalgic topics like their time in the baseball club.

However! Iori was a total pervert who had been furiously masturbating to the thought of Ryota!

What's more, unbeknownst to Ryota, a "Gachi-muchi Cock Battle" has broken out between Atsushi and Iori!?

What in the world is going to happen this spring!?

Points

Charming characters by Wasp!

The character design and original art for this title are handled by the talented illustrator Wasp!

The depiction of muscles and eroticism has been powered up even more since Gachi-Natsu! Please enjoy the erotic scenes with Ryota, Atsushi, and the new character, Iori.

No complicated system at all!

A branching story with many choices? Full-blown, in-depth gameplay? There are no such elements!

"Enjoying the erotica and story casually!" is the concept of this simple, one-way novel game.

Fierce Battle! The Gachi-muchi Cock Battle!

In this game, a battle between men, Atsushi vs. Iori—a super-throbbing, perverted, Gachi-muchi Cock Battle—breaks out!

The fierce cock battle heats up, eventually leading to a 3P!? But don't worry! This is a fun and naughty 3P with absolutely no NTR developments that would ruin Ryota and Atsushi's relationship
